signals.headline: Ethereum Technical Breakout Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Technical Breakout Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
Ethereum is sitting on the same support zone that previously triggered a 170% rally in 2021, with the pattern now repeating in April 2026.[1] The token is trading at $2,184 and showing early recovery signs with bullish technical indicators (RSI near oversold, major moving averages converging).[2]

signals.headline: Institutional Ethereum Inflows Accelerate | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Institutional Ethereum Inflows Accelerate | YES | HIGH confidence**
The Ethereum Foundation staked 70,000 ETH worth $143 million, reducing sell-side pressure.[2] U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs recorded cumulative net inflows of $11.6 billion, with BlackRock's iShares holding over $6.5 billion in AUM.[2]

signals.headline: XRP ETF Momentum Reverses Historical Pattern | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Momentum Reverses Historical Pattern | YES | MED confidence**
XRP spot ETF inflows led the April rally (not futures), with $224 million flowing in during the first week—the largest single-country rebound since December. This structural difference matters because ETF shares don't liquidate on leverage unwinds.[3]
